title: "TouchScreen Nixdorf ba72a"

### Post by Maniuc on 2006-07-31
I'm trying to enable my touchscreen Nixdorf ba72a touchscreen

i have read that the driver is "mutouch" but I'm not sure.

Firstly, the device is in /dev/input/event0

if I do sudo cat /dev/input/event0 and I press on the screen, then I can view some garbage in the console. So it is not a hardware problem

my xorg.conf

```
# /etc/X11/xorg.conf (xorg X Window System server configuration file)
#
# This file was generated by dexconf, the Debian X Configuration tool, using
# values from the debconf database.
#
# Edit this file with caution, and see the /etc/X11/xorg.conf manual page.
# (Type "man /etc/X11/xorg.conf" at the shell prompt.)

# if it has not been modified since the last upgrade of the xserver-xorg

#   sudo dpkg-reconfigure -phigh xserver-xorg

Section "Files"
	FontPath	"/usr/share/X11/fonts/misc"
	FontPath	"/usr/share/X11/fonts/cyrillic"
	FontPath	"/usr/share/X11/fonts/100dpi/:unscaled"
	FontPath	"/usr/share/X11/fonts/75dpi/:unscaled"
	FontPath	"/usr/share/X11/fonts/Type1"
	FontPath	"/usr/share/X11/fonts/CID"
	FontPath	"/usr/share/X11/fonts/100dpi"
	FontPath	"/usr/share/X11/fonts/75dpi"
        # paths to defoma fonts
	FontPath	"/var/lib/defoma/x-ttcidfont-conf.d/dirs/TrueType"
	FontPath	"/var/lib/defoma/x-ttcidfont-conf.d/dirs/CID"
EndSection

Section "Module"
	Load	"GLcore"
	Load	"bitmap"
	Load	"ddc"
	Load	"dri"
	Load	"extmod"
	Load	"freetype"
	Load	"glx"
	Load	"int10"
	Load	"type1"
	Load	"vbe"
EndSection

Section "InputDevice"
	Identifier	"Generic Keyboard"
	Driver		"kbd"
	Option		"CoreKeyboard"
	Option		"XkbRules"	"xorg"
	Option		"XkbModel"	"pc105"
	Option		"XkbLayout"	"es"
EndSection

Section "InputDevice"
	Identifier	"Configured Mouse"
	Driver		"mouse"
	Option		"CorePointer"
	Option		"Device"		"/dev/input/mice"
	Option		"Protocol"		"ImPS/2"
	Option		"ZAxisMapping"		"4 5"
EndSection


Section "InputDevice"
   Identifier	"Touch"
   Driver	"mutouch"
   Option	"Type" "finger"
   Option	"Device" "/dev/input/event0"
   Option       "ScreenNo" "0"
   Option	"MinimumXPosition" "0"
   Option      	"MaximumXPosition" "3000"
   Option      	"MinimumYPosition" "0"
   Option      	"MaximumYPosition" "3000"
   Option      	"SendCoreEvents"   "yes"
EndSection

Section "Device"
	Identifier	"Chips and Technologies F69000 HiQVideo"
	Driver		"chips"
	BusID		"PCI:0:17:0"
EndSection

Section "Monitor"
	Identifier	"Monitor genérico"
	Option		"DPMS"
	HorizSync	28-40
	VertRefresh	43-60
EndSection

Section "Screen"
	Identifier	"Default Screen"
	Device		"Chips and Technologies F69000 HiQVideo"
	Monitor		"Monitor genérico"
	DefaultDepth	24
	SubSection "Display"
		Depth		1
		Modes		"800x600" "640x480"
	EndSubSection
	SubSection "Display"
		Depth		4
		Modes		"800x600" "640x480"
	EndSubSection
	SubSection "Display"
		Depth		8
		Modes		"800x600" "640x480"
	EndSubSection
	SubSection "Display"
		Depth		15
		Modes		"800x600" "640x480"
	EndSubSection
	SubSection "Display"
		Depth		16
		Modes		"800x600" "640x480"
	EndSubSection
	SubSection "Display"
		Depth		24
		Modes		"800x600" "640x480"
	EndSubSection
EndSection

Section "ServerLayout"
	Identifier	"Default Layout"
	Screen		"Default Screen"
	InputDevice	"Generic Keyboard"
	InputDevice	"Configured Mouse"
	InputDevice	"Touch"
EndSection

Section "DRI"
	Mode	0666
EndSection

```

```

and when I try xsetpointer "finger" i get:

```

X Error of failed request:  BadDevice, invalid or uninitialized input device
  Major opcode of failed request:  144 (XInputExtension)
  Minor opcode of failed request:  3 (X_OpenDevice)

  Current serial number in output stream:  11

I don't know what more to do, any help is pleased
